Estimate    Actual  Operator
       -         1  SEQUENCE
       -   1500000  ├─MATERIALISE AS m_SaveSubqueryResultToBuffer_30
       -   1500000  │ PROJECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
       -   1500000  │ TABLE SCAN orders
       -         1  └─PROJECT a1
       -         1    AGGREGATE COUNT(o_orderkey) AS a1
       -   1499994    PROJECT o_orderkey
       -   1499994    PROJECT o_orderkey
       -   1499994    RIGHT ANTI JOIN HASH ON PROJECTION_594.o_custkey = PROJECTION_599.o_custkey
       -   1500000    │└PROJECT o_custkey AS o_custkey_right, o_orderkey
       -   1500000    │ SCAN MATERIALISED SaveSubqueryResultToBuffer_30
       -         6    PROJECT o_custkey
       -         6    INNER JOIN HASH ON PROJECTION_603.c_custkey + 1 = PROJECTION_601.o_custkey + 1
       -   1500000    │└PROJECT o_custkey + 1 AS a10, o_custkey
       -   1500000    │ SCAN MATERIALISED SaveSubqueryResultToBuffer_30
       -         1    PROJECT c_custkey + 1 AS a5, c_custkey
       -         1    FILTER (c_custkey = 1) AS a7
       -    150000    TABLE SCAN customer
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  WHERE c.c_custkey + 1 = o.o_custkey + 1
    AND c.c_custkey = 1
);

theorem.description: Count ORDERS rows without a matching CUSTOMER via NOT EXISTS on +1 adjusted keys and a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-ANTI-ORDERS-CUSTOMER-PLUS1-FILTER-CUSTOMER
